"'''Race for Survival'''" is a [[Star Wars (comic strip)|comic strip]] written by [[Archie Goodwin]] and illustrated by [[Al Williamson]]. It was published by the [[Los Angeles Times Syndicate]] in [[1983]].

==Plot summary==
This comic strip details the escape of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] from [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] in the last stages of the [[Yavin blockade|blockade]] that followed the destruction of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. The Rebel fleet braves a perilous escape route, pursued by [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Amise Griff]]'s forces.
{{Plot}}
